title: Real Estate Administrative & Operations Assistant
description:
Real Estate Administrative & Operations Assistant



Position Summary

We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Real Estate Administrative & Operations Assistant to support a fast-paced real estate office. This role provides administrative support to management and agents, coordinates real estate transactions, assists with tenant and property operations, maintains MLS listings and CRM records, and helps manage the company’s social media presence.



The ideal candidate is task-oriented, highly organized, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple priorities while maintaining strong communication with clients, tenants, agents, and management.



Key Responsibilities

Administrative & Office Support

• Provide administrative support to management and real estate agents.

• Maintain office organization, schedules, and communication systems.

• Respond to client inquiries via phone,
, and online platforms.

• Assist with document preparation, filing, and record management.

• Coordinate meetings, appointments, and office operations.

Transaction Coordination

• Manage real estate transactions from contract to closing.

• Ensure all required documents and disclosures are completed.

• Coordinate with agents, lenders, attorneys, inspectors, and clients.

• Track important transaction deadlines and compliance requirements.

• Maintain organized digital transaction files.

MLS & CRM Management

• Enter and update property listings in the Multiple Listing Service (MLS).

• Ensure listing details, photos, pricing, and status updates are accurate.

• Maintain and update CRM systems with client, prospect, and transaction information.

• Track client communications and follow-up reminders.

• Assist agents with lead generations, listing setup, updates, and marketing details.

Tenant & Property Operations Support

• Assist with tenant communication and inquiries.

• Help maintain lease and tenant documentation.

• Coordinate property-related administrative tasks.

• Assist with maintenance coordination and vendor communication when needed.

Social Media & Marketing Support

• Coordinate and schedule social media posts for listings and company updates.

• Assist with marketing materials for property listings and promotions.

• Maintain consistency of branding across marketing platforms.

Client & Agent Support

• Provide excellent customer service to clients and tenants.

• Assist agents with listing preparation, documentation, and scheduling.

• Ensure smooth communication between clients, agents, and management.



Qualifications

• Strong organizational and administrative skills

• Excellent attention to detail

• Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines

• Strong written and verbal communication skills

• Customer-service oriented

• Experience with MLS systems and CRM platforms preferred

• Proficiency with Microsoft Office or Google Workspace

• Experience with social media platforms

• Real estate or property management experience is a plus



To apply, please submit the following:

• Your resume

• A brief cover notes describing your experience working in a fast-paced administrative or real estate environment

• The completed exercise below:



An agent has just signed a listing agreement for a new property. You are responsible for preparing the listing for market.

Write a short step-by-step checklist (8–12 steps) outlining how you would prepare the listing from contract signing through MLS entry and marketing launch.



Thank you for your interest. We look forward to hearing from you.

description:
Company Overview

A fast-growing CPG food brand in the seasoning and specialty salt space, focused on bold flavor, home chefs, and elevated everyday cooking. The brand blends culinary creativity with lifestyle content, including food, cocktails, travel, and outdoor experiences.

The founder is highly creative and produces a large volume of raw content but needs support turning that into consistent, strategic, revenue-driving digital assets.

This is an early-stage, self-funded brand with strong personality and significant growth potential.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Part-Time Short-Form Video & Content Marketing VA to support a founder-led seasoning brand.

This person will:

Edit and repurpose short-form video content

Support light blog writing and content repurposing

Schedule and publish content across platforms

Help create consistency and 
ntum across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts

Act as a creative execution partner while the founder focuses on sales, partnerships, and growth

This role starts lean, approximately 8 hours video and 2 hours copy weekly, and may expand over time.

Work Hours: Flexible, overlap with US CST preferred

Commitment: Part-time to start, long-term potential



Core Responsibilities



Short-Form Video Editing (Primary Focus)

Edit high-volume short-form content for:

TikTok

Instagram Reels

YouTube Shorts

Create strong hooks and attention-grabbing first 3 seconds

Add captions, text overlays, light motion graphics

Optimize pacing for engagement and retention

Repurpose older content into fresh formats

Pull clips from longer footage such as cooking, taste tests, interviews

Organize and manage large raw footage library, over 2TB existing content

Content themes include:

Cooking demos

Cocktail and mocktail recipes

Taste tests, including competitor comparisons

Outdoor and travel lifestyle content

Event footage including celebrity interactions

Product-forward usage 
nts



Blog and Copy Support (Secondary Focus)

Convert video content into SEO-friendly blog posts on Shopify

Turn recipe walkthroughs into structured written recipes

Support light
 copy repurposing for Klaviyo

Help draft captions aligned with brand voice

Assist with organizing and formatting digitized legacy recipes

This is not a full-time copywriter role, but must be comfortable writing clear, structured content.



Content Publishing and Scheduling

Upload and schedule posts using:

Meta Business Suite

TikTok Studio

YouTube Studio

Or approved scheduling tool

Manage posting calendar

Ensure consistency across platforms

Add CTAs as directed

Coordinate with founder on publishing approvals when needed



Content Optimization and Iteration

Track which short-form content performs best

Identify patterns in engagement

Suggest testing angles such as blind taste tests or bold comparisons

Support experimentation mindset

This role supports iteration and 
ntum, not perfection.



Digital Organization

Maintain organized Google Drive structure

Categorize footage by:

Theme

Product type

Platform

CTA direction

Support asset management for future campaigns



Required Skills

Strong short-form video editing experience

Skilled in CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar

Deep understanding of TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts formatting

Ability to create engaging hooks

Comfortable working with founder-led content

Basic copywriting skills

Experience working with Shopify blogs

Organized and process-oriented

Comfortable handling large volumes of content

title: END-TO-END ACCOUNTANT/BOOKKEEPER
description:
FULL-TIME NIGHT SHIFT | Remote | For High-Performance Professionals Only



Pivotl is seeking an exceptional Remote Accountant to join our specialized team providing advanced accounting services across the United States. This is a FULL-TIME, NIGHT SHIFT position designed for seasoned professionals who thrive under pressure and deliver excellence consistently.



IMPORTANT: This is NOT a side job or flexible arrangement. We need dedicated professionals accustomed to night shift operations who can commit to full-time hours. If you're seeking part-time work or are uncomfortable with night schedules, please do not apply.



What Sets This Role Apart

- 4-day work week, 3 days off - Maximize your work-life balance

- Premium compensation for proven high performers

- Comprehensive benefits: Paid vacation/sick leave, extensive paid training, generous Christmas bonus

- Complete autonomy in a remote environment - perfect for self-directed professionals

- Specialized focus on HOME SERVICE industries (HVAC, Solar, and related sectors)



The Challenge - Are You Ready?



We need a financial data cleanup specialist who can handle:

- Granular-level financial data reconciliation across complex business structures (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, AR, Vendor Recon)

- High-pressure deadline management while maintaining 100?curacy

- Independent problem-solving of complex accounting discrepancies

- Proactive identification and resolution of financial irregularities

- Core Responsibilities for Elite Performers

- Execute comprehensive book-cleanup projects with tight deadlines

- Perform detailed adjusting entries with a deep understanding of tax implications

- Master QuickBooks Online for complex multi-entity structures

- Conduct advanced data analysis using Excel and Google Sheets

- Manage full-cycle AR/AP, invoicing, payroll, and bank reconciliations

- Deliver precise categorization and accounting across diverse business models



Non-Negotiable Requirements

- Proven track record in US accounting with demonstrable results

- Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online

- Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills for complex data manipulation

- Exceptional English communication - written and verbal

- Night shift availability - this is not flexible

- Autonomous work style - you must be self-directed and proactive

- Competitive Advantages (Preferred)

- Industry background in HVAC, solar, generators, roofing, foundations, or electrical

- Construction/contracting industry experience highly valued

- Experience using any of the following: Service Titan, Housecall Pro, Sera, Jobber, Service Trade, Acculynx, etc

- Experience using Keeper.app



Who Should Apply

- Rock stars only. We want professionals who:

- Thrive in high-pressure, deadline-driven environments

- Work autonomously without constant supervision

- Have extensive experience cleaning up complex historical financial data

- Take ownership of results and deliver consistent excellence

- Are committed to full-time night shift operations



Who Should NOT Apply

- Those seeking part-time or flexible arrangements

- Professionals are uncomfortable with night shift schedules

- Anyone looking for a "side job" or supplemental income

- Those requiring extensive hand-holding or micromanagement

- Ready to prove you're among the elite?



Apply Here: 
reers/bookkeeping-role

Pivotl - Where exceptional professionals build exceptional careers.
